headline: 3 Reasons CHD is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Church & Dwight has had an impressive run over the past six months as its shares have beaten the S&P 500 by 5.1%. The stock now trades at $96.48, marking a 12.9% gain. This run-up might have investors contemplating their next move.

headline: Edgewell Personal (EPC) Surges 15.4%: Is This an Indication of Further Gains?
summary: Edgewell Personal (EPC) witnessed a jump in share price last session on above-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions for the stock doesn't suggest further strength down the road.
